response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-00:39: Identified '火炎' by Ziyoou-vachi. Performed by Mori Calliope & Otonose Kanade. Found lyrics. 2. 00:39-03:44: Talk segment. 3. 03:44-05:00: Identified '不可思議のカルテ' by fox capture plan. Performed by Otonose Kanade & Hakui Koyori. Lyrics obtained from internal knowledge as search results for lyrics were empty.
response.global_summary: A video featuring two separate vocal performances by VTubers: '火炎' (Kaen) performed by Mori Calliope and Otonose Kanade, and '不可思議のカルテ' (Fukashigi no Karte) performed by Otonose Kanade and Hakui Koyori. The video includes a conversation segment between the songs.

scenes.description: Mori Calliope and Otonose Kanade perform '火炎'. They are dancing on stage.

scenes.description: Talk segment between Mori Calliope and Otonose Kanade.
Otonose Kanade and Hakui Koyori perform '不可思議のカルテ'. They sing together on stage.
